input.prompt:
I'm adding dark mode to my .NET MAUI Android app. I created ResourceDictionary
themes and used StaticResource to bind colors in my XAML pages. When I
switch themes at runtime nothing changes — the colors stay the same. Also,
when the user toggles dark mode in Android settings my app seems to restart
completely. What am I doing wrong?

input.initialPrompt:
I'm adding dark mode to my .NET MAUI Android app. I created ResourceDictionary
themes and used StaticResource to bind colors in my XAML pages. When I
switch themes at runtime nothing changes — the colors stay the same. Also,
when the user toggles dark mode in Android settings my app seems to restart
completely. What am I doing wrong?

data.content:
Two separate issues here:

**1. `StaticResource` doesn't update at runtime**
`StaticResource` resolves once at XAML load time. Switch to `DynamicResource` so bindings re-evaluate when you swap the `ResourceDictionary`:

```xml
<!-- ❌ Won't update -->
<Label TextColor="{StaticResource PrimaryTextColor}" />

<!-- ✅ Updates at runtime -->
<Label TextColor="{DynamicResource PrimaryTextColor}" />
```

Then swap themes by replacing/merging dictionaries:

```csharp
// In your theme-toggle handler:
var mergedDicts = Application.Current.Resources.MergedDictionaries;
mergedDicts.Clear();
mergedDicts.Add(useDark ? new DarkTheme() : new LightTheme());
```

**2. Android restarts the Activity on UI-mode change**
By default, Android destroys and recreates the `Activity` when dark mode toggles. Tell it to handle the change in-place by adding `UiMode` to `ConfigChanges` in your `MainActivity.cs`:

```csharp
[Activity(
    Theme = "@style/Maui.SplashTheme",
    MainLauncher = true,
    ConfigurationChanges = ConfigChanges.ScreenSize
                         | ConfigChanges.Orientation
                         | ConfigChanges.UiMode       // ← add this
                         | ConfigChanges.ScreenLayout
                         | ConfigChanges.SmallestScreenSize
                         | ConfigChanges.Density)]
public class MainActivity : MauiAppCompatActivity { }
```

To also **react** to the system toggle, override `OnConfigurationChanged` or subscribe to `Application.Current.RequestedThemeChanged`:

```csharp
Application.Current.RequestedThemeChanged += (s, e) =>
{
    bool useDark = e.RequestedTheme == AppTheme.Dark;
    // swap your ResourceDictionary here
};
```

**TL;DR** — `StaticResource` → `DynamicResource` for runtime updates; add `ConfigChanges.UiMode` to prevent the Activity restart.
data.reasoningText:
The user has two issues with their .NET MAUI Android app related to dark mode:

1. **StaticResource vs DynamicResource**: They're using `StaticResource` to bind colors, but `StaticResource` is resolved once at load time and doesn't update when the resource dictionary changes. They need to use `DynamicResource` instead for runtime theme switching.

2. **App restarting on Android dark mode toggle**: When the user changes the Android system dark mode setting, the app restarts completely. This is because Android recreates the Activity by default when the UI mode configuration changes. They need to handle this configuration change in their Android activity.


I'll walk through the specific fixes needed for both issues.
